# TorchEBM

> Composable primitives for energy-based generative modeling in PyTorch, spanning EBMs, diffusion, flow matching, and Schrödinger bridges.

Energy-based models define probability distributions through a scalar energy
function, with lower energy meaning higher probability. This formulation is
general enough that much of modern generative modeling, from MCMC sampling and
score matching to diffusion, flow matching, and Schrödinger bridges, factors
into the same components: a field, a probability path, a coupling, an
objective, and an integrator. TorchEBM implements these components as
composable PyTorch primitives, so EBM training and interpolant-based
generation are configurations of one library rather than separate codebases.

Key components:
- Samplers: LangevinDynamics, HamiltonianMonteCarlo, RiemannianManifoldHMC, FlowSampler
- Losses: ContrastiveDivergence, ScoreMatching, EquilibriumMatchingLoss, EnergyMatchingLoss
- Interpolants: LinearInterpolant, CosineInterpolant, VariancePreservingInterpolant
- Couplings: IndependentCoupling, SinkhornCoupling, ExactOTCoupling, ReflowCoupling
- Integrators: EulerMaruyama, Heun, RK4, Dopri5, Leapfrog, GeneralisedLeapfrog
- Models: ConditionalTransformer2D, neural network components
- Datasets: TwoMoons, EightGaussians, SwissRoll, and more synthetic benchmarks


## Getting Started

- [Home](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/index.md): Main documentation page for TorchEBM
- [Getting Started](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/getting_started/index.md): Installation and first workflows

## Concepts

- [Design and Scope](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/concepts/design/index.md): The unifying abstraction and method taxonomy
- [The Energy-Based View](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/concepts/energy_view/index.md): Energies, scores, and the model contract
- [Sampling and Integration](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/concepts/sampling/index.md): MCMC, flow sampling, and integrators
- [Learning Objectives](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/concepts/objectives/index.md): Training objectives from CD to energy matching
- [Interpolants and Couplings](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/concepts/transport/index.md): Interpolants and couplings

## API Reference

- [core](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/core/index.md): Core base classes
- [samplers](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/samplers/index.md): Sampling algorithms
- [losses](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/losses/index.md): Training objectives
- [interpolants](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/interpolants/index.md): Interpolation schemes
- [couplings](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/couplings/index.md): Couplings
- [integrators](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/integrators/index.md): Numerical integrators
- [models](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/models/index.md): Neural network architectures
- [datasets](https://soran-ghaderi.github.io/torchebm/latest/api/torchebm/datasets/index.md): Data generators
